name: US-China Biomedical Technology, Inc.
summary: US-China Biomedical Technology, Inc. operates as an early stage biomedical technology and services company. The company was formerly known as Cloud Security Corporation and changed its name to US-China Biomedical Technology, Inc. in February 2018. US-China Biomedical Technology, Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Irvine, California.
